excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Urban Design lists Main round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-16. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Main round: 16 January 2026 Clearing round: 10 April 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Early applications are strongly encouraged.
